evals.name: debug-cleanup
evals.expected_output: Removes debug printlines, preserves FIXME(JMT), identifies nil dereference and float truncation bugs, renames poor variable, cleans unnecessary comments, produces structured report
expectations: Debug fmt.Println lines were removed from orders.go
The // FIXME: (JMT) comment was preserved and NOT removed
Nil dereference risk identified — order.Amount accessed without nil check (original nil check was removed)
Float-to-int truncation issue identified — int(x) loses precision
Variable 'x' was renamed to something descriptive like 'discount' or 'discountAmount'
Comment about 'originally written by Bob in 2022' was flagged or removed as unnecessary/transient
Report includes severity classifications (Critical/Important/Minor)
Git state was not modified (no git add, git commit, etc.)

evals.name: security-vuln
evals.prompt: Check my staged changes before I push
evals.expected_output: Identifies SQL injection, hardcoded secret, unchecked error, missing validation; removes dead code; flags missing tests; produces severity-classified report
expectations: SQL injection vulnerability identified as Critical — string formatting used in SQL query with unsanitized email input
Hardcoded JWT secret ('super-secret-key-12345') identified as a security issue
Unchecked row.Scan error identified — error return value is silently ignored
Missing input validation identified — email and password could be empty
Commented-out old implementation (LoginHandlerOld) was removed as dead code
Unused 'os' import identified
Information leakage identified — error message includes user email
Missing test coverage flagged — no tests for auth handler
Git state was not modified

evals.name: multi-file-feature
evals.prompt: Prepare my code for review — 5 new files for a users CRUD feature
evals.expected_output: Decomposes into sub-agents for 5+ files, identifies race condition, removes debug code, flags ignored errors, notes missing tests and incomplete TODO, produces structured multi-file report
expectations: Race condition identified in service.go — Get() and List() read map without mutex lock while other methods use locking
Debug fmt.Println removed from handler.go
Debug fmt.Printf removed from middleware.go
Ignored strconv.Atoi error identified in handler.go Get and/or Delete handlers
Missing Delete handler test identified
TODO comment in middleware.go flagged — 'actually validate the token' indicates incomplete implementation
Unused 'strings' import in handler.go identified
Report includes file references for each issue
Git state was not modified
